hero.name: Ammar Mahmoud Farghaly
hero.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer & Tech Entrepreneur
hero.headline: Crafting High-End Web Experiences & Scalable Digital Products
hero.description: I partner with businesses worldwide to build premium digital solutions that drive growth, streamline operations, and create exceptional user experiences.

about.title: A Senior Web Developer & Your Trusted Tech Partner
about.description: With years of experience in full-stack development, I specialize in creating elegant, high-performance web applications that solve real business problems. From startups to enterprise solutions, I bring technical expertise and a keen eye for design to every project.

services.title: Comprehensive Digital Solutions
services.description: From concept to deployment, I provide end-to-end digital services tailored to your business needs.

webdev.title: Professional Web Design & Development
webdev.description: Custom-built, responsive websites and web applications using cutting-edge technologies. From landing pages to complex platforms, every project is crafted for performance, aesthetics, and scalability.

dashboards.title: Custom Internal Systems & Dashboards
dashboards.description: Streamline your operations with tailor-made internal tools, admin panels, and business dashboards that boost productivity and provide real-time insights.

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.description: Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android. Engaging user interfaces with robust backend integration for seamless performance.

email.title: Corporate Email Setup
email.description: Professional email solutions with your domain. Full setup, configuration, and migration services to ensure your business communication is secure and reliable.

maintenance.title: Maintenance, Support & SLAs
maintenance.description: Ongoing technical support, performance monitoring, security updates, and Service Level Agreements to keep your digital assets running smoothly 24/7.

design.title: Graphic Design
design.description: Eye-catching company profiles, social media graphics, brand identity design, and marketing materials that establish a strong visual presence for your brand.

seo.title: SEO & Digital Marketing
seo.description: Data-driven search engine optimization and digital marketing strategies to increase your online visibility, drive organic traffic, and convert visitors into customers.

portfolio.title: Featured Projects
portfolio.description: A selection of projects that showcase my expertise in building scalable, high-performance digital solutions.

blog.title: Latest Articles
blog.description: Thoughts, tutorials, and insights on web development, technology trends, and digital innovation.
blog.noPosts: No articles available yet. Check back soon!

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.description: Have a project in mind or want to discuss a partnership? I'd love to hear from you. Reach out through any of the channels below.
